meta.title: Matías Leonel Grigoriadis — Fullstack Developer
meta.description: Professional portfolio of Matías Leonel Grigoriadis, fullstack developer specialized in Java, Spring Boot and modern web technologies. Mar del Plata, Argentina.

hero.name: Matías Leonel Grigoriadis
hero.description: Fullstack Software Developer with 3+ years of experience designing and implementing robust, secure and scalable solutions. Specialized in Java, Spring Boot, Hibernate and SQL, with proficiency in HTML/CSS, JavaScript and training in React and TypeScript.
hero.commitment: Committed to secure development best practices and agile methodologies, bringing clear communication, proactivity and continuous learning.

experience.label: Professional Experience
experience.title: Where I grow every day
responsibilities: End-to-end feature development with Java + Spring and Hibernate for Backend and PHP, JavaScript (jQuery), HTML/CSS for Frontend.
Implementation of new features and bug resolution. Active participation in value deliveries.
Application of secure development best practices, focused on code quality and data protection.
Active participation in deployments, technical support and documentation improvements.
Collaboration with QA and technical teams, improving cross-team communication.
